title: Photongraph
subtitle: A creative photography event centered around the art of light painting, encouraging students to explore visual storytelling through illumination. The event combined artistic expression with technical understanding, attracting participation from across the country.
description:
Title of the event: Photongraph 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to make the students within our college and beyond aware of the art of Light Painting and to get them acquainted with the electronics required to arrange the lights. BVP Optica in collaboration with the Digital Arts Society of our college organised a light painting contest on 23rd December in which students from all over the country participated and submitted their best click.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Hands-on exposure to electronics and techniques used in light painting.
Encouraged innovation and experimentation with light and visuals.
